description: Carrier-phase differential TEC (dTEC) time series, anchored to group-delay absolute TEC

fields.name: minute_boundary
fields.description: Unix epoch timestamp of minute boundary

fields.name: n_ticks
fields.description: Number of carrier phase measurements in this minute

fields.name: dtec_mean_tecu
fields.description: Mean integrated dTEC over the minute (anchored to group-delay TEC if available)

fields.name: dtec_std_tecu
fields.description: Standard deviation of dTEC within the minute (scintillation indicator)

fields.name: dtec_rate_tecu_per_s
fields.description: Mean dTEC/dt rate over the minute

fields.name: anchor_tec_tecu
fields.description: Group-delay absolute TEC used as anchor (null if no anchor available)

fields.name: is_anchored
fields.description: Whether the dTEC was anchored to group-delay TEC

fields.name: sigma_noise_tecu
fields.description: Estimated noise floor from detrended MAD

fields.name: mean_snr_db
fields.description: Mean SNR of carrier phase measurements

fields.name: quality_flag
fields.description: Quality flag based on n_ticks, SNR, and noise floor
